subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, unto all who are in the heavens and on the earth, that through it honored servants may be quickened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب الله المهیمن القیوم الی من فی السموات و الارض لیحیین به عباد مکرمون
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @power of the Manifestation of God, @belief and denial, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation
